# Architectuur Beslissingen {#section-design-decisions}

*\<Belangrijke, kostbare, kritische, grootschalige of risicovolle architectuurbeslissingen inclusief rationale. Gebruik ADR (Architecture Decision Records) formaat waar van toepassing.\>*


This directory contains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for the pluginlake project.

| ID                                              | Title                                           | Status   | Date       |
| ----------------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------- | -------- | ---------- |
| [ADR-001](adr-001-asset-architecture.md)        | Asset architecture and extensibility            | Accepted | 2026-02-17 |
| [ADR-002](adr-002-omop-storage-architecture.md) | OMOP data storage architecture                  | Proposed | 2026-02-17 |
| [ADR-003](adr-003-ducklake-data-catalog.md)     | DuckLake integration with Dagster + logging      | Proposed | 2026-02-23 |
| [ADR-004](adr-004-data-organization.md)         | Data organization and naming conventions         | Proposed | 2026-02-24 |
| [ADR-005](adr-005-fastapi-gateway.md)           | FastAPI as unified API gateway                   | Proposed | 2026-03-05 |
